# ServerConfig

Server configuration for opencode serve and web commands

**Properties**

| Name        | Type      | Required | Description |
| :---------- | :-------- | :------- | :---------- |
| port        | int       | ❌       |             |
| hostname    | str       | ❌       |             |
| mdns        | bool      | ❌       |             |
| mdns_domain | str       | ❌       |             |
| cors        | List[str] | ❌       |             |
